name: Training Center
description: Institutional enablement-course aesthetic: clean white surface, deep royal-blue accent, bilingual-friendly sans, high information density. Signature: a 6px royal-blue level rail on the stage's left edge. Built for layered certification / enablement-course videos.
descriptionZh: 企业培训 / 认证课气质：净白底 + 深 royal 蓝 + 中英双语友好的无衬线 + 高信息密度。签名：舞台左缘 6px royal 蓝色层级条。为分层认证 / 赋能课程视频而生（导学 / 模块深讲都合适）。
